defect_1_missing_file_unreachable.how: expected admitted-name set built from remote manifest before local inspection; every expected name required present; missing name reported, never dropped

defect_2_self_referential_checksums.how: expected checksums bound from remote immutable metadata (lfs/blob sha256) and reconciled against locally computed sha256; missing immutable identity fails closed

defect_3_storage_resume_absent_from_conj.how: free-space/expected-bytes/temp-overhead/safety-margin/partial-cleanup/deterministic-resume/final-reconciliation/cache-isolation conjunction; gpu ceilings excluded as non-storage evidence

defect_6_tests_not_exercising_orchestrat.how: run_staging_orchestration composes remote-manifest->download->discover->presence->checksum->storage; integration tests force missing/partial/extra/cache/wrong-checksum/insufficient-space/cleanup/resume/mutable-revision/path-escape through that same path

defect_5_complete_tokenizer_conjunction.how: complete_tokenizer_admission now binds every observed value to an independently derived expected value by EQUALITY (not non-null/hex-shape): exact cleanup equality (defect 1); BOS/EOS/PAD bound to expected identities (defect 2); strict positive int rejecting booleans for encoded length (defect 3); manifest/chat-render/id-sequence digest equality vs independent recomputation, not shape (defect 4). Expected special-token identities and expected cleanup are required inputs (raise if absent).
defect_5_complete_tokenizer_conjunction.remaining: defect-5 point-5 live production composition: the live orchestration must DERIVE the expected values independently (immutable tokenizer manifest digest, fresh chat-template rendering digest, fresh private-fixture encoding digest, expected special-token ids from pinned files) and feed both observed+expected here.

remaining_blockers.defect_4_source_and_load_manifest_admiss: pinned model-implementation-source proofs (text-only Qwen3_5MoeForCausalLM class/source mapping, shared-expert construction, Gated DeltaNet projections, final RMS norm, untied 248320 head, vision/MTP omission from admitted load manifest) not yet bound; configuration metadata alone is insufficient
remaining_blockers.tokenizer_defect5_point5_live_derivation: expected tokenizer values must be independently recomputed in the live production path, not supplied by a caller
remaining_blockers.live_cli_wiring: run_staging_orchestration + complete_tokenizer_admission not yet wired into the live HfApi/snapshot_download CLI entrypoint with a fresh end-to-end rerun binding real remote LFS identities
